overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an industrial district of Night City. The character travels under elevated highways, past construction sites, and approaches a KENDACHI facility during a clear morning.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure with integrated lighting
large industrial facility with yellow and black hazard stripe pattern
wide pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway
metal safety railing along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive elevated highway structure in an industrial district. The yellow and black industrial building dominates the right side while the concrete walkway stretches ahead into the shadow of the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial pedestrian corridor under elevated highway

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the environment opens up to more light and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: construction cranes visible above distant industrial buildings
tall palm tree visible against the sky

segments.scene_description: As the character emerges from the shadow of the overpass into direct sunlight, industrial cranes and smoke stacks become visible in the distance. More pedestrians appear ahead, walking along the concrete corridor beneath the elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial construction yard with storage tanks

events.description: turns left off the main path to reveal an industrial construction site
turns back toward the main street

agents.ego_description: deviating from the path to observe the construction area before turning back

entered.detail: yellow construction cranes towering over the industrial site
large cylindrical storage tank with metal scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The character turns left off the main path into a wide-open construction yard, revealing large industrial storage tanks and scaffolding. After briefly observing the industrial complex, the character turns back toward the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated highway with digital advertising

events.description: returns to the main street under the elevated highway
large colorful digital billboard becomes prominent ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the street toward the digital displays and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction passing by on the left

entered.detail: large colorful digital display with shifting geometric patterns suspended over the street
curved on-ramp structure for the elevated highway
tall modern street lamps along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main street beneath the elevated highway, the character walks toward a large, vibrant digital billboard displaying shifting colorful patterns. The asphalt street is lined with modern street lamps and other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: KENDACHI commercial facility entrance and industrial complex

events.description: passing the entrance to view industrial tanks behind the facility

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the KENDACHI facility entrance to view the industrial complex beyond

entered.detail: large illuminated sign spelling KENDACHI above the building entrance
dark modern building facade with large windows
security fence with barbed wire surrounding the industrial area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the KENDACHI facility, passing beneath the large illuminated entrance sign. After entering the facility grounds, the view opens to show industrial storage tanks and security fencing surrounding the complex, with the elevated highway now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shadowed industrial district that gradually opens into the bright, high-tech perimeter of a corporate facility. It begins beneath the oppressive concrete of a massive elevated highway, moving past a yellow and black industrial building while shrouded in deep shadow. As the character emerges into direct sunlight, the view expands to reveal distant cranes and smoke stacks before the camera turns left into a wide-open construction yard filled with scaffolding and storage tanks. The scene then shifts back to the main asphalt street, passing under modern street lamps and a vibrant, shifting digital billboard. Finally, the movement leads toward the KENDACHI facility, passing beneath a large illuminated sign to reveal a complex of security fencing and industrial tanks with the highway receding to the right.
